text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

Re-open the PR since the update was backed out. 
There are some changes pending: 
. create devel/emacs22 port (a PR for repocopy emacs -> emacs22 has been 
submitted); 
. make apropriate updates to Mk/bsd.emacs.mk; 
. (may be) do an experimental run at the FreeBSD ports cluster since 
there are many dependencies.
